use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and login pages
Destructive action buttons for delete or remove operations
Ghost-style inline buttons for less prominent actions
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based Button component with CVA-powered variant system supporting default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Features proper accessibility with focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and asChild composition pattern. Includes shadow styling with shadow-black/5 and rounded-lg corners for modern UI aesthetics.
